task: IKEA SG Product Image Analysis via GPT-4o Vision

materials.upholstery: Faux leather (PU) or high-quality vinyl — smooth with slight sheen
materials.legs: Dark wood or metal (black-painted), matte finish, short tapered
materials.hardware: Silver/grey electric recliner control panel on left armrest

lighting.shadows: Subtle rightward cast shadow for depth

composition.framing: Centered horizontally with ample negative space above/below
composition.depth_of_field: Deep — entire sofa in sharp focus

scene_context.purpose: Showcase design, color, and recliner feature

materials.upholstery: Textured woven fabric — polyester/cotton blend, heathered nubby texture
materials.legs: Chrome-plated steel or aluminum, cylindrical, polished reflective

lighting.key_light: Front-left, creating highlights on left armrest and seat cushions
lighting.fill_light: Large softboxes or overhead diffusion for even illumination
lighting.shadows: Soft subtle shadow beneath sofa grounding it

composition.angle: 3/4 angle, rotated slightly right — shows front, left profile, backrest
composition.framing: Centrally framed, slightly lower on vertical axis for breathing room
composition.depth_of_field: Deep — full sofa in sharp focus
composition.product_placement: Sole subject, centered for catalog layout

scene_context.props: None — no pillows, blankets, plants, or people
scene_context.purpose: Focus on functional/aesthetic qualities of the sofa

materials.tabletop: Light-colored wood — plywood or veneer (birch/beech), visible grain, smooth flat finish, center cable management hole
materials.base: Metal (steel/aluminum), matte black, rigid central column + cross-shaped foot
materials.feet_caps: Plastic or rubber floor protectors — dark caps

colors.secondary: Pale natural wood tone — approx #E6DCC6 or #F5E9D3

lighting.key_light: Front-left — highlights on top-left edge and front column face
lighting.fill_light: Reflector/softbox from opposite side to soften right shadows
lighting.quality: Soft diffused — softboxes/large reflectors, even illumination

composition.angle: Slightly elevated isometric (~30-45°) — shows top, side rim, cross-base
composition.depth_of_field: Deep — entire object sharp from front to back leg tips
composition.product_placement: Centered on floor plane, stable balanced composition

scene_context.type: White void / cutout — no walls, floors, or environmental cues
scene_context.purpose: Catalog/website — focus on form, function, and Scandinavian design

methodology.step_1: Navigated to IKEA SG sofas listing page (https://www.ikea.com/sg/en/cat/sofas-fu003/) — 192 items
methodology.step_2: Extracted product detail page URLs via DOM query (a[href*='/sg/en/p/'])
methodology.step_3: Visited 3 product detail pages; extracted main image URLs via JavaScript DOM inspection
methodology.step_4: Analyzed each image with GPT-4o Vision — identifying materials, colors, lighting, composition, scene
methodology.step_5: Compiled structured JSON output with all findings

ikea_photography_patterns.summary: IKEA's product photography follows consistent patterns across categories:
ikea_photography_patterns.lighting: All 3 products use professional studio lighting with front-left key light, soft diffusion (softboxes), subtle shadow for depth, and no harsh shadows
ikea_photography_patterns.background: All 3 use pure white (#FFFFFF) seamless backgrounds — 'white void' style for e-commerce isolation
ikea_photography_patterns.composition: All 3 use slightly elevated angles (3/4 or isometric), centered framing, deep depth of field (everything in focus)
ikea_photography_patterns.props: None of the main catalog images use props or lifestyle context — pure product isolation. Scene/lifestyle shots exist as separate secondary images
ikea_photography_patterns.image_size: All main images are 600×600px JPEGs ('s5' size on IKEA CDN, with 'xl' variants available)
